model_name: Rangel-Reyes2017 - Dendritic Immunotherapy Improvement for an Optimal Control Murine Model
short_description_original: This is a mathematical model provides a platform for investigating the efficacy of dendritic cell vaccines during cancer treatment while accounting for obstacles such as immunosuppression and poor transference to the lymphatic system.
related_publication_name: Dendritic Immunotherapy Improvement for an Optimal Control Murine Model.
